MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Zahid Shaikh is present in pro per.
Defendant James Smith is present.
Attorney Joe Catalano representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jim Watson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of DEC-27-2011 is vacated.
